title: Intel's stock soars 20% as results top estimates, with chipmaker showing signs of growth
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Intel's stock surged 20% after strong first-quarter earnings, with adjusted earnings per share of 29 cents and revenue of $13.58 billion, significantly exceedin
excerpt: Intel's stock surged 20% after strong first-quarter earnings, with adjusted earnings per share of 29 cents and revenue of $13.58 billion, significantly exceeding Wall Street's estimates. The chipmaker's revenue rose more than 7%, indicating growth.

content.introduction: Intel's stock surged 20% after strong first-quarter earnings, with adjusted earnings per share of 29 cents and revenue of $13.58 billion, significantly exceeding Wall Street's estimates. The chipmaker's revenue rose more than 7%, indicating growth.
